recommendations: 💧 BOIL all drinking water before consumption to prevent infection.
🧼 WASH your hands thoroughly with soap and clean water after using the toilet and before eating.
🏥 REPORT immediately to the nearest health facility if you experience watery diarrhea or vomiting.
💧 USE Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS) at home while traveling to the health facility.
😷 WEAR a mask in crowded public places to prevent spreading or catching the infection.
🤧 COVER your mouth and nose with a tissue or your elbow when coughing or sneezing.
🪟 ENSURE good ventilation by keeping windows open in homes and public transport.
🤒 SEEK medical advice if you have a persistent cough, fever, or difficulty breathing.
🦟 SLEEP under a treated mosquito net every night to prevent mosquito bites.
🚫 ELIMINATE standing water around your home where mosquitoes can breed.
🩺 GET TESTED for Malaria immediately if you develop a fever or chills.
👕 WEAR long-sleeved clothing and trousers during peak mosquito hours (dusk and dawn).

default_recommendations: 📢 STAY INFORMED through official health channels and report unusual symptoms to your clinic.
🏥 Visit your nearest health facility for a professional diagnosis if you feel unwell.
